ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., death, injury) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., natural causes, accidents, diseases) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "event_cause" TEXT /* Detailed cause of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to the events table) */,
  "year_of_death" INTEGER /* Year of death */,
  "residence_or_place_of_death" TEXT /* Residence or place of death */,
  "county_of_residence" TEXT /* County of residence */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the deceased */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "last_data_refresh" TEXT /* Date of last data refresh */,
  "death_cause" TEXT /* Detailed cause of death */,
  "death_location" TEXT /* Specific location of death (e.g., hospital, home) */,
  "death_certifier" TEXT /* Person who certified the death */,
  "death_certifier_type" TEXT /* Type of certifier (e.g., doctor, medical examiner) */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Exact date of death */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital records, census data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES ages ("age_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_county_of_residence FOREIGN KEY ("county_of_residence") REFERENCES counties ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Less than 1 year, 1 - 4 years) */,
  "age_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "age_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a roles table for more detailed role management */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "death_id" INTEGER /* ID of the death event (foreign key to the deaths table) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_update_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("death_id") REFERENCES deaths ("death_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to the users table) */,
  "death_id" INTEGER /* ID of the death event (foreign key to the deaths table) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., office, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("death_id") REFERENCES deaths ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
